lesson.menu_desc: Big & small, colors, action words -- 26 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 1 -- Dino Safari
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Bento | Lesson 1 -- Dino Safari

listenings.text: Look! We are in the jungle. It is green. I can see a dinosaur. It is big. It is very big! The big dinosaur can run. Run, run, run! And look! A tree. The tree is green too.

Look here. I can see two dinosaurs. One dinosaur is big. One dinosaur is small. The big dinosaur is green. The small dinosaur is green too. The small dinosaur can run fast. The big dinosaur is by a big tree.
